critical_questions.question: Is this the patient's first seizure, or have they had prior seizures / a known seizure disorder?
Did the episode include tongue-biting or urinary/bowel incontinence?
Any history of alcohol use, recent heavy drinking, or abrupt cessation (withdrawal risk)? Any illicit substance use?
Has the patient been counseled on driving safety / applicable state seizure-reporting requirements following this event?
Was there a post-ictal confusion period, and how long did it last?
